SINCE BUYING THE 2014 KIA FWD 4-CYL VEHICLE, I HAVE HAD ABOUT 5 INSTANCES WHERE THE CAR WOULD NOT START AFTER I PRESSED THE BRAKE PEDAL AND THEN THE IGNITION SWITCH. KIA AND HYUNDAI HAD BRAKE SWITCH ISSUES IN MODELS CIRCA 2011 AND EARLIER, BUT I COULD NOT FIND ANYTHING ABOUT WHET

narrative.headline: What 2014 Kia Sorento owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints dominate owner reports for this model year, with owners describing unusual noises noticed shortly after purchase. Structural and electrical issues also draw significant complaint volume, with owners noting liftgate behavior problems and instrument cluster readability concerns. Exterior lighting complaints echo the speedometer visibility issue, with owners reporting difficulty reading the gauge in daylight conditions.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report hearing a strange or abnormal noise coming from the engine, in some cases noticed as soon as the vehicle was driven off the lot. · 29 fire · 2 crash · 3 injured

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 KIA SORENTO. THE CONTACT ATTEMPTED TO CLOSE THE LIFT GATE BY PRESSING THE CLOSE BUTTON, BUT WHEN IT CLOSED  IT OPENED INDEPENDENTLY. THE CONTACT ATTEMPTED TO CLOSE IT MANUALLY BUT THE LIFT GATE WOULD NOT CLOSE. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER FOR I
issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: Owners report that the power liftgate closes and then reopens on its own, and that manually closing it does not resolve the behavior. · 2 fire · 1 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report being unable to read the electroluminescent speedometer in daylight, describing the display as too dim to determine vehicle speed without taking eyes off the road for several seconds. · 9 fire · 5 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: Owners report the speedometer needle is extremely difficult to locate in bright daylight conditions, with the problem worsening on sunnier days despite adequate illumination at night. · 1 fire
